description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ocaml/opam Docker image for three OCaml versions. Add a job named ocaml:4030 that runs in the default stage, uses image ocaml/opam:ubuntu-16.04_ocaml-4.03.0 and executes the exact command bash -c "$BUILD_SCRIPT". Add a job named ocaml:4042 that runs in the default stage, uses image ocaml/opam:ubuntu-16.04_ocaml-4.04.2 and runs bash -c "$BUILD_SCRIPT". Add a job named ocaml:4050 that runs in the default stage, uses image ocaml/opam:ubuntu-16.04_ocaml-4.05.0 and runs bash -c "$BUILD_SCRIPT". Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, uses image ocaml/opam:ubuntu-16.04_ocaml-4.05.0, runs bash -c "$BUILD_SCRIPT" followed by bash -c "$BUILD_DOC", publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and relies on the BUILD_SCRIPT and BUILD_DOC variables defined in the pipeline.
